message:
refactor(render): improve ANSI escape sequence handling and parsing

Refactors the ANSI module for better robustness and expanded
escape sequence support.

Parsing improvements:
- Restructure CSI parameter parsing for clarity
- Add support for sub-parameters (colon-separated values)
- Improve OSC (Operating System Command) parsing
- Handle DCS (Device Control String) sequences
- Add APC (Application Program Command) recognition
- Support PM (Privacy Message) sequences

SGR (Select Graphic Rendition) enhancements:
- Add support for SGR 58/59 (underline color)
- Handle SGR 73/74/75 (superscript/subscript)
- Support SGR 53 (overline)
- Add SGR 4:x extended underline styles
- Improve true-color (SGR 38/48) parsing robustness

Cursor control:
- Add support for DECSC/DECRC (save/restore cursor)
- Handle DECTCEM (cursor visibility)
- Support cursor style changes (DECSCUSR)

Mode handling:
- Add bracketed paste mode recognition
- Support focus event reporting mode
- Handle mouse tracking mode changes

Error handling:
- Graceful recovery from malformed sequences
- Preserve unrecognized sequences for pass-through
- Add detailed error context for debugging

These improvements ensure correct rendering of output from
applications using modern terminal features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
